response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer but the resume shows no substantive C++ experience (only a brief stint at National Instruments in 2000-2001), which is a hard requirement of 8 years. There is no evidence of large-scale cloud compute platform work, distributed systems at scale, or formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers. Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, which does not align with the C++ infrastructure focus of this role.
strengths: Long, varied engineering career across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Strong testing/TDD culture and mentoring via workshops, courses, and dojos
Some low-latency, high-throughput backend exposure (Sociomantic-era microservices)
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement; C++ usage is minimal and dated
No demonstrated large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed-systems leadership
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / distributed systems scale
